description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a short, robust barrel and a compact, ergonomic design. The receiver and stock feature a striking galaxy-themed color pattern blending purples, blues, and reds, while the barrel and pump are matte black. The pump grip is ribbed for enhanced handling and appears to be made of a dark, textured polymer or wood. The stock is a traditional full stock with a smooth, curved contour for shoulder support. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall build suggests durability and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact pump-action shotgun with a galaxy-patterned stock and matte black barrel, featuring a ribbed pump grip and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full galaxy-patterned stock, ribbed pump grip, and matte black barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile and the colorful stock's gradient pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the galaxy pattern and ribbed pump grip visible.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view showing the circular muzzle opening and the ribbed pump grip beneath the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
